scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "cd ai-service && .venv\Scripts\uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
